repo.description: [Machine Learning Journal (ECML-PKDD 2022 journal track)] Quick and Robust Feature Selection: the Strength of Energy-efficient Sparse Training for Autoencoders

terms.context_snippet: This repository contains code for the paper, Quick and Robust Feature Selection: the Strength of Energy-efficient Sparse Training for Autoencoders by Zahra Atashgahi, Ghada Sokar, Tim van der Lee, Elena Mocanu, Decebal Constantin Mocanu, Raymond Veldhuis, and Mykola Pechenizkiy.…
